message:
Add self-test workflow for changelog-adder action

Uses the local action to test on PRs to this repository.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+name: Add Changelog Entry
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    types: [opened, synchronize]
+
+jobs:
+  changelog:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+      pull-requests: write
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+          ref: ${{ github.head_ref }}
+
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/changelog-adder
+        with:
+          anthropic_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
